overall.description: Aerial drone footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing two giant holographic koi fish (one orange, one blue) swimming around a circular plaza in a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The camera orbits the scene before ascending to reveal towering skyscrapers and a large PETROCHEM corporate sign.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of a futuristic circular plaza surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers. Two massive holographic koi fish, one glowing orange and one blue, swim gracefully in circular patterns around the plaza's central void. The drone camera slowly orbits the scene, capturing the cyberpunk cityscape and the mesmerizing movement of the holographic fish.

segments.scene_description: The drone continues its slow orbit around the plaza as the holographic fish maintain their graceful circular swimming patterns. Around the 45-second mark, the camera passes beneath a horizontal metal railing that briefly crosses the upper portion of the frame, creating a momentary occlusion before the view clears.

segments.scene_description: The camera begins to ascend, pulling back from the plaza to reveal more of the towering cyberpunk cityscape. A large illuminated 'PETROCHEM' sign becomes visible on a building to the right. The holographic fish continue their circular dance below but appear smaller as the drone gains altitude, showcasing the vast scale of the neon-lit metropolis.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial orbit around a futuristic circular plaza that emphasizes the scale of a neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape. It begins with a high-angle view of the plaza's central void, where two massive holographic koi fish in glowing orange and blue swim in graceful, circular patterns. As the drone camera slowly orbits the scene, the perspective shifts to reveal the surrounding architecture of towering skyscrapers drenched in vibrant neon light. The movement continues to sweep across the urban landscape, capturing the mesmerizing interplay between the fluid motion of the holographic creatures and the rigid geometry of the city.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a close orbit of a neon plaza and ascends into a wide reveal of a towering cyberpunk metropolis. It begins by circling the graceful, swimming patterns of two giant holographic koi fish, momentarily passing beneath a horizontal metal railing that briefly occludes the upper frame. As the view clears, the camera begins to pull back and climb, causing the holographic fish to shrink in scale against the vastness of the city below. The scene then expands to reveal the surrounding cityscape, where a large illuminated PETROCHEM sign emerges on a building to the right. Finally, the drone gains further altitude, showcasing the immense scale of the neon-lit skyscrapers stretching into the night sky.
